title: C-PvP Optimizer
description: Crystal PvP Optimizer is a performance-focused Minecraft pack designed to boost FPS, enhance visibility, and streamline textures for competitive crystal PvP
body:
Crystal PvP Optimizer is a lightweight, high-performance Minecraft modpack tailored specifically for competitive Crystal PvP. Designed with serious players in mind, it focuses on maximizing visibility, reducing distractions, and delivering consistent performance even under intense combat conditions.

This pack removes unnecessary graphical clutter and streamlines core PvP visuals. Key items like end crystals, obsidian, beds, and armor are rendered with simplified textures to make them easier to identify during fast-paced fights. This gives players faster reaction times and better placement precision, especially in high-stakes duels or large-scale anarchy battles.

Crystal PvP Optimizer also includes optimizations that improve FPS across the board, making it suitable for both high-end and lower-end systems. Whether you're on a competitive server or a chaotic anarchy world, the pack helps ensure your performance never holds you back.

While intentionally minimal in its additions, the pack is fully compatible with most PvP clients and performance mods. It integrates cleanly with setups that includes Fabric and Sodium as well as other optimization tools without adding unnecessary overhead.
